headline: Can Hasbro's Digital Push Unlock a New Growth Runway for MAGIC?
summary: HAS' MAGIC goes deeper into digital: Arena gets Marvel rights as Wizards & Digital Gaming revenues jump 26% and margins hit 51.2%.

headline: All You Need to Know About Hasbro (HAS) Rating Upgrade to Strong Buy
summary: Hasbro (HAS) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

headline: Bears are Losing Control Over Hasbro (HAS), Here's Why It's a 'Buy' Now
summary: Hasbro (HAS) appears to have found support after losing some value lately, as indicated by the formation of a hammer chart. In addition to this technical chart pattern, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher enhances the stock's potential for a turnaround in the near term.
